response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and user experience. However, his background lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ (only ~1 year at National Instruments) and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure leadership. His leadership is more hands-on and collaborative rather than strategic or architectural for cloud platforms.
strengths: Extensive experience in software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and mentoring (e.g., workshops, dojos).
Diverse technical background with exposure to distributed systems, real-time data processing, and DevOps tooling.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating initiative and passion for technology.
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only ~1 year) against the 8-year minimum requirement.
No explicit experience leading cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure as a technical lead.
Most leadership experience is informal (e.g., mentoring, workshops) rather than formal technical leadership in cloud/DevOps contexts.
